creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
* Ariff Abdullah <ariff@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Try various config options through hint.pcm.%d.config , possibly
> gpio0,1,2 , ovref, etc..

I can confirm that setting hint.pcm.0.config to gpio0 the audio output
works, but the headjack doesn't, which means rerouting to the headjack
is done in software. I'm not an expert when it comes to sound cards. Is
this normal? If so, does the snd_hda driver support?

-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
 WWW: http://g-rave.nl/
